<content>1: # AgentCube Implementation Plan - AR-001 to AR-011
2: 
3: ## Overview
4: This plan maps the 11 Architectural Requirements (AR-001 through AR-011) to the physical files and implementation logic required to build the AgentCube Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform.
5: 
6: ---
7: 
8: ## AR-001: Sandbox Orchestration Core (CRDs + Workload Manager)
9: 
10: ### Description
11: Implement Kubernetes CRDs for AgentRuntime and CodeInterpreter, along with the Workload Manager that reconciles sandbox creation, manages lifecycle, and handles garbage collection.
12: 
13: ### Files to Create
14: 
15: #### 1. API Types (`pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/`)
16: - `groupversion_info.go` - Package and scheme registration
17: - `register.go` - Kind metadata for CodeInterpreter and AgentRuntime
18: - `agent_type.go` - AgentRuntime CRD with SandboxTemplate, SessionTimeout, MaxSessionDuration
19: - `codeinterpreter_types.go` - CodeInterpreter CRD with CodeInterpreterSandboxTemplate, AuthMode, WarmPoolSize
20: - Types: TargetPort, AuthModeType, ProtocolType
21: 
22: #### 2. Common Types (`pkg/common/types/`)
23: - `types.go` - SandboxInfo, SandboxEntryPoint, CreateSandboxRequest, CreateSandboxResponse
24: 
25: #### 3. API Errors (`pkg/api/`)
26: - `errors.go` - Error functions: NewSessionNotFoundError, NewSandboxTemplateNotFoundError, etc.
27: 
28: #### 4. Workload Manager (`pkg/workloadmanager/`)
29: - `config.go` - Config struct with Port, RuntimeClassName, EnableTLS, TLSCert, TLSKey, EnableAuth
30: - `server.go` - Server struct with router, k8sClient, sandboxController, tokenCache, storeClient
31: - `handlers.go` - HTTP handlers: handleHealth, handleAgentRuntimeCreate, handleDeleteSandbox, handleCodeInterpreterCreate
32: - `k8s_client.go` - K8sClient with clientset, dynamicClient, informers, podInformer
33: - `informers.go` - GVR constants: AgentRuntimeGVR, CodeInterpreterGVR, SandboxGVR, SandboxClaimGVR
34: - `workload_builder.go` - Sandbox/SandboxClaim building logic, identity secret constants
35: - `reconciler.go` - SandboxReconciler with status watching and notification
36: - `garbage_collector.go` - GC with 15s interval, batch size 16, 2min timeout
37: - `token_cache.go` - TokenCache with LRU + expiry (1000 max, 5min TTL)
38: - `auth.go` - Auth middleware with context keys
39: 
40: #### 5. Main Entry (`cmd/workload-manager/`)
41: - `main.go` - CLI flags: --port (8080), --runtime-class-name, --enable-tls, --tls-cert, --tls-key, --enable-auth
42: 
43: ### Logic
44: - CRDs use kubebuilder markers for validation and printing columns
45: - AgentRuntime creates Sandbox with pod template; CodeInterpreter supports warm pools via SandboxClaim
46: - GC runs every 15s to delete expired (TTL) and inactive (15min idle) sandboxes
47: - Token cache uses LRU with 5min TTL per entry
48: 
49: ---
50: 
51: ## AR-002: Session Routing (Router Service)
52: 
53: ### Description
54: Implement the Router service that routes HTTP traffic to sandbox pods based on session information, with JWT-based authentication.
55: 
56: ### Files to Create
57: 
58: #### 1. Router Package (`pkg/router/`)
59: - `config.go` - Config struct: Port, Debug, EnableTLS, MaxConcurrentRequests
60: - `server.go` - Server struct with sessionManager, storeClient, httpTransport, jwtManager
61: - `handlers.go` - Health handlers, agent invoke handlers
62: - `session_manager.go` - SessionManager interface and implementation
63: - `jwt.go` - JWTManager with RSA 2048-bit key generation, RS256 signing
64: - `proxy.go` - Reverse proxy setup with Director and ModifyResponse
65: - `middleware.go` - Concurrency limit middleware
66: 
67: #### 2. Main Entry (`cmd/router/`)
68: - `main.go` - CLI flags: --port, --enable-tls, --tls-cert, --tls-key, --debug, --max-concurrent-requests
69: 
70: ### Logic
71: - Routes: `/health/live`, `/health/ready`, `/v1/namespaces/:namespace/agent-runtimes/:name/invocations/*path`, `/v1/namespaces/:namespace/code-interpreters/:name/invocations/*path`
72: - JWTManager generates RS256 tokens with 5min expiration
73: - Identity secret created in Kubernetes if clientset available
74: - SessionManager queries Workload Manager for sandbox endpoints
75: 
76: ---
77: 
78: ## AR-003: Session Store (Redis/Valkey)
79: 
80: ### Description
81: Implement the session storage layer using Redis or Valkey for persisting sandbox session data with TTL and activity tracking.
82: 
83: ### Files to Create
84: 
85: #### 1. Store Interface (`pkg/store/`)
86: - `interface.go` - Store interface: Ping, GetSandboxBySessionID, StoreSandbox, UpdateSandbox, DeleteSandboxBySessionID, ListExpiredSandboxes, ListInactiveSandboxes, UpdateSessionLastActivity, Close
87: 
88: #### 2. Redis Implementation (`pkg/store/`)
89: - `store_redis.go` - redisStore with go-redis/v9 client
90: - `singleton.go` - Storage() singleton with initStoreOnce
91: - `errors.go` - ErrNotFound
92: 
93: #### 3. Valkey Implementation (`pkg/store/`)
94: - `store_valkey.go` - valkeyStore with valkey-go client
95: 
96: ### Logic
97: - Keys: `session:{id}`, `session:expiry` (ZSET), `session:last_activity` (ZSET)
98: - StoreSandbox: SETNX + ZADD to both index keys
99: - ListExpired/ListInactive: ZRANGEBYSCORE with LIMIT then pipeline GET
100: - Environment: REDIS_ADDR, REDIS_PASSWORD, VALKEY_ADDR, VALKEY_PASSWORD, STORE_TYPE
101: 
102: ---
103: 
104: ## AR-004: Idle Cleanup Controller (AgentD)
105: 
106: ### Description
107: Implement the agentd controller that monitors sandbox activity and cleans up idle sandboxes.
108: 
109: ### Files to Create
110: 
111: #### 1. AgentD Package (`pkg/agentd/`)
112: - `reconciler.go` - Reconciler struct with Reconcile method
113: - `constants.go` - SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 minutes
114: 
115: #### 2. Main Entry (`cmd/agentd/`)
116: - `main.go` - Controller-runtime manager setup
117: 
118: ### Logic
119: - Watches Sandbox CRDs from agents.x-k8s.io
120: - Reads `last-activity-time` annotation from sandbox
121: - Calculates expiration = lastActivity + 15min
122: - Requeues after time.Until(expirationTime) or 30s on parse error
123: 
124: ---
125: 
126: ## AR-005: CI/CD Pipeline
127: 
128: ### Description
129: Implement GitHub Actions workflows for building, testing, and releasing AgentCube components.
130: 
131: ### Files to Create
132: 
133: #### 1. GitHub Workflows (`.github/workflows/`)
134: - `main.yml` - Build workflow on PR/release
135: - `e2e.yml` - E2E tests with Kind cluster
136: - `lint.yml` - Go lint with golangci-lint
137: - `test-coverage.yml` - Coverage with Codecov
138: - `codegen-check.yml` - Verify generated code
139: - `copyright-check.yml` - Copyright headers
140: - `python-sdk-tests.yml` - Python SDK tests
141: - `python-lint.yml` - Python lint with ruff
142: - `build-push-release.yml` - Docker buildx and push
143: - `dify-plugin-publish.yml` - Dify plugin publishing
144: 
145: #### 2. Test Scripts (`test/e2e/`)
146: - `run_e2e.sh` - E2E test orchestration
147: - `e2e_test.go` - Go E2E tests
148: - `test_codeinterpreter.py` - Python E2E tests
149: 
150: ### Logic
151: - E2E: Kind cluster v0.30.0, agent-sandbox v0.1.1, Helm install, port-forward, Go/Python tests
152: - Build: Go 1.24, Docker buildx multi-platform
153: - Lint: golangci-lint, ruff for Python
154: 
155: ---
156: 
157: ## AR-006: Deployment (Helm + Docker)
158: 
159: ### Description
160: Implement Helm charts for deploying AgentCube to Kubernetes and Dockerfiles for all components.
161: 
162: ### Files to Create
163: 
164: #### 1. Helm Charts (`manifests/charts/base/`)
165: - `Chart.yaml` - Chart metadata
166: - `values.yaml` - All configuration values
167: - `templates/workloadmanager.yaml` - Deployment + Service
168: - `templates/agentcube-router.yaml` - Deployment + Service
169: - `templates/rbac/workloadmanager.yaml` - SA, ClusterRole, ClusterRoleBinding
170: - `templates/rbac-router.yaml` - Optional RBAC for router
171: - `templates/volcano-agent-scheduler.yaml` - Optional Volcano scheduler
172: - `crds/runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh_agentruntimes.yaml` - AgentRuntime CRD
173: - `crds/runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh_codeinterpreters.yaml` - CodeInterpreter CRD
174: 
175: #### 2. Dockerfiles (`docker/`)
176: - `Dockerfile` - Workload manager (Go builder, Alpine runtime)
177: - `Dockerfile.router` - Router (Go builder, Alpine runtime)
178: - `Dockerfile.picod` - PicoD (Go builder, Ubuntu runtime with Python)
179: 
180: #### 3. Makefile
181: - `Makefile` - All build targets: docker-build, docker-buildx-push, e2e, etc.
182: 
183: #### 4. Scripts (`hack/`)
184: - `update-codegen.sh` - Kubernetes code generation
185: - `update-copyright.sh` - Copyright header generation
186: - `boilerplate.go.txt` - Go boilerplate
187: - `boilerplate.py.txt` - Python boilerplate
188: 
189: ### Logic
190: - Helm: router.rbac.create optional, volcano.scheduler.enabled optional
191: - Images: ghcr.io/volcano-sh/agentcube-router, workloadmanager, picod
192: - RBAC: workloadmanager ClusterRole has extensive rules for sandboxes, pods, secrets
193: 
194: ---
195: 
196: ## AR-007: Python SDK
197: 
198: ### Description
199: Implement the Python SDK for interacting with AgentCube control plane and data plane.
200: 
201: ### Files to Create
202: 
203: #### 1. SDK Package (`sdk-python/agentcube/`)
204: - `__init__.py` - Exports: CodeInterpreterClient, AgentRuntimeClient
205: - `code_interpreter.py` - CodeInterpreterClient with execute_command, run_code, file operations
206: - `agent_runtime.py` - AgentRuntimeClient with invoke method
207: - `exceptions.py` - AgentCubeError, CommandExecutionError, SessionError, DataPlaneError
208: 
209: #### 2. Client Layer (`sdk-python/agentcube/clients/`)
210: - `control_plane.py` - ControlPlaneClient: create_session, delete_session
211: - `code_interpreter_data_plane.py` - CodeInterpreterDataPlaneClient: execute, files, list
212: - `agent_runtime_data_plane.py` - AgentRuntimeDataPlaneClient: invoke
213: - `__init__.py` - Re-exports
214: 
215: #### 3. Utilities (`sdk-python/agentcube/utils/`)
216: - `http.py` - create_session with HTTPAdapter
217: - `utils.py` - read_token_from_file
218: - `log.py` - get_logger
219: - `__init__.py` - Module marker
220: 
221: #### 4. Configuration (`sdk-python/`)
222: - `pyproject.toml` - Package config: agentcube-sdk, dependencies: requests, PyJWT, cryptography
223: 
224: ### Logic
225: - ControlPlaneClient: POST /v1/code-interpreter, DELETE /v1/code-interpreter/sessions/{id}
226: - DataPlaneClient: /v1/namespaces/{ns}/code-interpreters/{name}/invocations/*
227: - Session header: x-agentcube-session-id
228: - Timeouts: connect=5s, total=120s, pool size=10
229: 
230: ---
231: 
232: ## AR-008: CLI Toolkit
233: 
234: ### Description
235: Implement the CLI tool for packaging, building, publishing, and invoking agents.
236: 
237: ### Files to Create
238: 
239: #### 1. CLI Package (`cmd/cli/agentcube/`)
240: - `__init__.py` - __version__, exports
241: - `cli/main.py` - Typer app with commands: pack, build, publish, invoke, status
242: - `models/pack_models.py` - MetadataOptions dataclass
243: 
244: #### 2. Runtime Layer (`cmd/cli/agentcube/runtime/`)
245: - `pack_runtime.py` - PackRuntime: workspace validation, Dockerfile generation, dependency processing
246: - `build_runtime.py` - BuildRuntime: local/cloud build
247: - `publish_runtime.py` - PublishRuntime: CR and K8s deployment publishing
248: - `invoke_runtime.py` - InvokeRuntime: agent invocation
249: - `status_runtime.py` - StatusRuntime: status retrieval
250: - `__init__.py` - Re-exports
251: 
252: #### 3. Services Layer (`cmd/cli/agentcube/services/`)
253: - `metadata_service.py` - AgentMetadata (Pydantic), MetadataService
254: - `docker_service.py` - DockerService: build, push, remove images
255: - `k8s_provider.py` - KubernetesProvider: deploy to K8s
256: - `agentcube_provider.py` - AgentCubeProvider: deploy AgentRuntime CR
257: 
258: #### 4. Configuration (`cmd/cli/`)
259: - `pyproject.toml` - Dependencies: typer, pydantic, pyyaml, httpx, docker, rich, packaging
260: 
261: ### Logic
262: - pack: validate workspace, generate Dockerfile, create metadata
263: - build: local (docker build) or cloud
264: - publish: agentcube (CR) or k8s (Deployment+Service)
265: - invoke: HTTP POST to router with payload
266: - status: GET from CR or K8s API
267: 
268: ---
269: 
270: ## AR-009: Integrations (Dify Plugin + Example)
271: 
272: ### Description
273: Implement integrations with Dify and example applications.
274: 
275: ### Files to Create
276: 
277: #### 1. Dify Plugin (`integrations/dify-plugin/`)
278: - `main.py` - Plugin entry point
279: - `manifest.yaml` - Plugin manifest (version, type, author, label, description, icon, resource, plugins)
280: - `provider/agentcube.yaml` - Tool provider definition
281: - `provider/agentcube.py` - AgentcubeCodeInterpreterProvider
282: - `tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.yaml` - Tool parameters: router_url, workload_manager_url, language, code, command, session_id
283: - `tools/agentcube-code-interpreter.py` - AgentcubeCodeInterpreterTool
284: - `requirements.txt` - dify-plugin, agentcube-sdk
285: - `GUIDE.md`, `README.md`, `PRIVACY.md`, `.difypkg`
286: 
287: #### 2. PCAP Analyzer Example (`example/pcap-analyzer/`)
288: - `pcap_analyzer.py` - FastAPI app with SandboxRunner, LangGraph agents
289: - `requirements.txt` - FastAPI, LangChain, LangGraph, uvicorn
290: - `Dockerfile` - uv base image, installs reqs, copies agentcube
291: - `deployment.yaml` - K8s Deployment with env vars
292: - `README.md` - Documentation
293: 
294: ### Logic
295: - Dify: Tool provider with code interpreter tool; router_url/workload_manager_url as credentials
296: - PCAP Analyzer: ReAct agent with sandbox runner for script execution and analysis
297: 
298: ---
299: 
300: ## AR-010: Code Execution (PicoD)
301: 
302: ### Description
303: Implement the PicoD service - a secure code execution sandbox with JWT authentication and file operations.
304: 
305: ### Files to Create
306: 
307: #### 1. PicoD Package (`pkg/picod/`)
308: - `config.go` - Config struct: Port, Workspace
309: - `server.go` - Server struct with gin engine, authManager, workspaceDir
310: - `auth.go` - AuthManager with RSA public key, JWT middleware
311: - `execute.go` - ExecuteHandler: command execution with timeout
312: - `files.go` - File handlers: upload (JSON/multipart), list, download
313: - `health.go` - HealthCheckHandler
314: 
315: #### 2. Main Entry (`cmd/picod/`)
316: - `main.go` - CLI flags: --port, --workspace
317: 
318: ### Logic
319: - JWT: RS256 validation with *rsa.PublicKey from PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY env
320: - Execute: Command execution with stdout/stderr capture, exit code 124 on timeout
321: - Files: Path sanitization with symlink evaluation, mode 0644 default, 32MB body limit
322: - Routes: /api/execute, /api/files (POST/GET), /api/files/*path (GET), /health
323: 
324: ---
325: 
326: ## AR-011: Codegen and Build Tools
327: 
328: ### Description
329: Implement code generation tools for Kubernetes client generation, CRD generation, and copyright headers.
330: 
331: ### Files to Create
332: 
333: #### 1. Code Generation Scripts (`hack/`)
334: - `update-codegen.sh` - Kubernetes code-generator integration
335: - `update-copyright.sh` - Apache boilerplate injection
336: - `boilerplate.go.txt` - Go copyright header
337: - `boilerplate.py.txt` - Python copyright header
338: 
339: #### 2. Generated Code
340: - `client-go/` - Generated Kubernetes clients for CRDs (via update-codegen.sh)
341: - `pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/zz_generated.deepcopy.go` - DeepCopy methods
342: 
343: #### 3. Makefile Targets
344: - `gen-crd` - Generate CRDs from API types
345: - `gen-client` - Generate K8s clients
346: - `gen-check` - Verify code is up to date
347: - `gen-copyright` - Add copyright headers
348: 
349: ### Logic
350: - controller-gen v0.17.2 for CRD and DeepCopy generation
351: - k8s.io/code-generator v0.34.1 for client generation
352: - Copyright check uses sponge (moreutils) for in-place editing
353: 
354: ---
355: 
356: ## Summary
357: 
358: | AR | Component | Key Files |
359: |----|-----------|-----------|
360: | AR-001 | Sandbox Orchestration | pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/, pkg/workloadmanager/, cmd/workload-manager/ |
361: | AR-002 | Session Routing | pkg/router/, cmd/router/ |
362: | AR-003 | Session Store | pkg/store/ |
363: | AR-004 | Idle Cleanup | pkg/agentd/, cmd/agentd/ |
364: | AR-005 | CI/CD | .github/workflows/, test/e2e/, Makefile |
365: | AR-006 | Deployment | manifests/charts/base/, docker/, hack/ |
366: | AR-007 | Python SDK | sdk-python/agentcube/ |
367: | AR-008 | CLI Toolkit | cmd/cli/agentcube/ |
368: | AR-009 | Integrations | integrations/dify-plugin/, example/pcap-analyzer/ |
369: | AR-010 | Code Execution | pkg/picod/, cmd/picod/ |
370: | AR-011 | Codegen Tools | hack/, Makefile targets |
371: 
372: ---
373: 
374: ## Dependencies Summary
375: 
376: - **Go**: 1.24.4 (module: github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube)
377: - **Python**: ≥3.10 (SDK, CLI)
378: - **Kubernetes**: CRDs runtime.agentcube.volcano.sh/v1alpha1, agents.x-k8s.io/v1alpha1
379: - **Storage**: Redis (go-redis/v9), Valkey (valkey-go)
380: - **Auth**: JWT RS256, K8s TokenReview
381: - **Build**: Docker, Buildx, Helm 3, controller-gen v0.17.2

(End of file - total 381 lines)
</content>

# AgentCube Implementation Plan - AR-001 to AR-011

## Overview
This plan maps the 11 Architectural Requirements (AR-001 through AR-011) to the physical files and implementation logic required to build the AgentCube Kubernetes-native sandbox orchestration platform.

---

## AR-001: Sandbox Orchestration Core (CRDs + Workload Manager)

### Description
Implement Kubernetes CRDs for AgentRuntime and CodeInterpreter, along with the Workload Manager that reconciles sandbox creation, manages lifecycle, and handles garbage collection.

### Files to Create

#### 1. API Types (`pkg/apis/runtime/v1alpha1/`)
- `groupversion_info.go` - Package and scheme registration
- `register.go` - Kind metadata for CodeInterpreter and AgentRuntime
- `agent_type.go` - AgentRuntime CRD with SandboxTemplate, SessionTimeout, MaxSessionDuration
- `codeinterpreter_types.go` - CodeInterpreter CRD with CodeInterpreterSandboxTemplate, AuthMode, WarmPoolSize
- Types: TargetPort, AuthModeType, ProtocolType

input.content:
/*
Copyright 2024 Volcano Authors

Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
You may obtain a copy of the License at

    http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0

Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
limitations under the License.
*/

package types

import (
	corev1 "k8s.io/api/core/v1"
)

type SandboxInfo struct {
	ID               string            `json:"id"`
	Namespace        string            `json:"namespace"`
	Name             string            `json:"name"`
	PodName          string            `json:"podName"`
	Status           string            `json:"status"`
	EntryPoint       SandboxEntryPoint `json:"entryPoint"`
	CreatedAt        int64             `json:"createdAt"`
	LastActivityTime int64             `json:"lastActivityTime"`
	ExpiresAt        int64             `json:"expiresAt"`
	Labels           map[string]string `json:"labels"`
	Annotations      map[string]string `json:"annotations"`
}

type SandboxEntryPoint struct {
	URL      string            `json:"url"`
	Protocol string            `json:"protocol"`
	Port     int32             `json:"port"`
	Auth     *AuthInfo         `json:"auth,omitempty"`
}

type AuthInfo struct {
	Type     string `json:"type"`
	Token    string `json:"token,omitempty"`
	Username string `json:"username,omitempty"`
	Password string `json:"password,omitempty"`
}

type CreateSandboxRequest struct {
	Namespace        string            `json:"namespace"`
	SandboxTemplate  string            `json:"sandboxTemplate"`
	SessionID        string            `json:"sessionId,omitempty"`
	Labels           map[string]string `json:"labels,omitempty"`
	Annotations      map[string]string `json:"annotations,omitempty"`
	TTLSeconds       *int64            `json:"ttlSeconds,omitempty"`
	IdleTimeout      *int64            `json:"idleTimeout,omitempty"`
	SessionTimeout   *int64            `json:"sessionTimeout,omitempty"`
	MaxSessionTTL    *int64            `json:"maxSessionTTL,omitempty"`
	ImagePullSecrets []string          `json:"imagePullSecrets,omitempty"`
}

type CreateSandboxResponse struct {
	SessionID string            `json:"sessionId"`
	Sandbox   SandboxInfo       `json:"sandbox"`
	Endpoints map[string]string `json:"endpoints"`
}

type CreateSandboxClaimRequest struct {
	Namespace     string `json:"namespace"`
	ClaimTemplate string `json:"claimTemplate"`
	SessionID     string `json:"sessionId,omitempty"`
	Labels        map[string]string `json:"labels,omitempty"`
}

type CreateSandboxClaimResponse struct {
	ClaimID   string `json:"claimId"`
	SessionID string `json:"sessionId"`
	PodName   string `json:"podName"`
	Endpoint  string `json:"endpoint"`
}

type PodTemplateSpec struct {
	metav1.TypeMeta `json:",inline"`
	metav1.ObjectMeta `json:"metadata,omitempty"`
	Spec            corev1.PodSpec `json:"spec,omitempty"`
}

type SandboxClaimInfo struct {
	ID        string `json:"id"`
	Namespace string `json:"namespace"`
	Name      string `json:"name"`
	PodName   string `json:"podName"`
	Endpoint  string `json:"endpoint"`
	Status    string `json:"status"`
}
